### How hard is it to get hired as a AI Intern at Nucor?
...
The interview difficulty is rated 2.5/5 by candidates. 60% report a positive experience. Emphasize Role-relevant depth and Communication in your prep.
...
### How long does the Nucor AI Intern hiring process take?
...
The process typically takes 2–6 weeks from application to final decision, depending on the hiring cycle and team availability.
...
is the interview process like?
...
Candidates often report recruiter or hiring-manager screens, role-specific technical depth (often verbal, SQL, or case-style — not a LeetCode marathon for this track), and behavioral interviews. 53% applied online.
...
### What questions are asked in a Nucor AI Intern interview?
...
Expect questions aligned with AI Intern: Role-relevant depth, Communication, Behavioral. InterviewSense focuses on spoken practice and structure so you sound clear under pressure.

results.title: Rob Harding
highlights:
IT Operations Team Lead | AI Vision Platform Builder | Turning existing infrastructure into real-time intelligence | Enterprise AI enablement
...
IT operations Lead Engineer at [Nucor Corporation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nucor-corporation)
...
IT Operations Team Lead with 25+ years of datacenter experience. I lead IT operations at Nucor while driving the real‑world adoption of AI and automation where it actually matters—safety, reliability, and uptime. My current focus is building AI computer vision platforms that improve safety and operational reliability using existing camera infrastructure. The goal is practical AI innovation with impact. Over the past year, I’ve designed and delivered multiple internal AI platforms, including: AI‑powered safety monitoring integrated with existing camera and NVR systems to detect hazards such as fire, smoke, leaks, man‑down events, and custom risk scenarios—delivering real‑time alerts with audit trails and analytics AI traffic heatmaps that visualize pedestrian, vehicle, and crane interaction zones to support engineering controls and safer routing Production and process‑vision pilots focused on early detection of abnormal conditions to prevent downtime events and avoid costly failures before they happen I am the creator of Safety Vision, an AI computer vision platform built outside normal project cycles and now being rolled out across the organization. Safety Vision detects safety risks in real time using existing cameras and delivers actionable insights that strengthen safety culture. Beyond those innovations, I help scale AI adoption by creating quick‑start guides, internal demos, and practical training so AI moves from theory to weekly safety and productivity gains. While my title is IT Operations, my impact spans safety, production, and leadership enablement. I regularly support other divisions evaluating AI solutions and help teams move from curiosity to execution. I value practical solutions, clear communication, and technology that earns trust on the floor—not buzzwords.

results.title: Lea Gates
highlights:
Business Intelligence Developer at [Nucor Corporation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nucor-corporation)
...
As a Business Intelligence Developer at Nucor Corporation, my work focuses on designing and developing modern Power BI reports and dashboards to empower business decision-making. By leveraging advanced data modeling techniques and Power BI expertise, I ensure the reliability and performance of analytics solutions. Recent projects include DEI metrics reporting and Talent Gender/Ethnicity analysis, where I collaborated closely with stakeholders to deliver actionable insights. With over a decade of experience in data analytics, I have consistently contributed to high-impact projects that enhance organizational strategies. My ability to integrate data sources like US Census ACS data and craft executive-level reports underscores my commitment to data-driven transformation. My mission is to deliver meaningful analytics that enable leaders to make informed decisions and foster measurable growth.
...
### Business Intelligence Developer at [Nucor Corporation](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nucor-corporation) (Current)
...
In my role as a Power BI Developer at Nucor Business Technology Group, I design and develop modern reports and dashboards to support business decision-making across Nucor Corporation. I ensure the availability and performance of visualizations to provide a consistent and reliable BI experience, leveraging my expertise in data modeling and Power BI. My work includes projects such as Talent Gender/Ethnicity analysis and DEI metrics reporting, where I collaborate closely with internal clients and stakeholders. I have designed and developed modern reports and dashboards using Power BI, adhering to industry standards and best practices. Ensuring the availability and performance of BI visualizations has been crucial in supporting consistent and reliable business decision-making across various departments. My responsibilities also involve developing and implementing security models in Power BI with row-level security to protect sensitive data. Exceptional communication skills have been essential in delivering reports and dashboards for executives and General Managers. Effective collaboration with remote teammates and partners has allowed for the integration of US Census ACS data with internal data for comprehensive community analysis. Utilizing advanced DAX queries and functions in Power BI, I create detailed and summary reports that enable enterprise-wide data comparison. Maintaining a strong commitment to safety, I initiate, lead, and uphold safety policies, practices, procedures, and housekeeping standards. Additionally, I support the development of a Talent Product Lane within the BI team, focusing on enabling business wins and providing a world-class user experience. My role also involves continuous learning and application of Power BI/Fabric REST API to enhance reporting capabilities and tenant usage analytics. Show less
...
Work that makes an impact you can’t always see. ✨

AI promised to make developers 10x more productive by 2026. Well, 2026 is here—did it happen?

Not even close. According to GitClear’s analysis of 75,000 developers, the median productivity boost is just 10%, with an average of 20%. Still meaningful, but far from the hype.

Here's how I got into Founders, Inc. Canopy with Hermai.ai while working a 9-to-5. The secret is simple: solve a problem that actually matters.
...
I spend my nights and weekends building AI agents. The same wall kept showing up: agents need to read and act on the web the way humans do, but none of the existing tools get you there. WebFetch, Firecrawl, and scraping services solve reading. They don't solve acting.
...
The current answer everyone is racing toward is "give the agent a browser." I tried it. It's painfully slow and burns an absurd amount of tokens. The closed-source players like parse.bot and integuru are going after enterprise with pricing to match.
...
So I built the open source version: Hermai.ai . It turns any website into an API the agent can call directly. No clicking through a UI that was designed for humans in the first place.
...
days since launch:
...
- 300+ website schemas in the registry
- Agents can now post, follow, and comment on X on my behalf, no developer account needed
- Government site endpoints are in, so the childcare fraud detector I shared earlier can pull the data it needs directly
...
Browser UIs were built for humans. Agents need something else. That's the whole thesis, and apparently Canopy agreed.
...
Missouri S&T gave me the chance to try a lot of different areas in Computer Science and I discovered that my favorite is Data Science. So I am excited to announce that I’ll be pursuing a masters in Data Analytics at Northwest Missouri State University in the fall. After being a Miner for 5 years, it'll be a new experience being a Bearcat but I am really excited for the opportunity to further my education at another great university.

# Senior Generative AI Engineer (Engineer Machine Learning 4) - 26195
...
HII-Mission Technologies is seeking a Senior Generative AI Engineer to join the team. This will be a remote position, with occasional travel to the team's office in Annapolis Junction, MD. This role will support the team in creating and managing end-to-end generative AI solutions. The team supports AI and digital modernization for both internal use and for external clients, with applications from intelligence analysis to manufacturing optimization.
...
- Operational AI Implementation: Research, develop, and apply machine learning, deep learning, and large language model (LLM) techniques for deployment in operational environments.
...
- Full Stack Design and Development: Rapidly design and create prototype applications to demonstrate AI capabilities. Transition prototypes to production by designing and implementing well-architected, scalable software stacks.
...
- Client Engagement: Support meetings with internal clients and external customers as a subject matter expert in AI and advanced software solutions, with a focus on cloud technologies and generative AI.
...
- 9 years relevant experience with Bachelors in related field; 7 years relevant experience with Masters in related field; 4 years relevant experience with PhD or Juris Doctorate in realted field; or High School Diploma or equivalent and 13 years relevant experience.
...
- Programming languages: Python
...
- Containerized development and deployment: Docker, Rancher, and/or K8s.
- Cloud engineering: Azure, AWS, or GCP.
- Databases: SQL, NoSQL, and/or vector databases.
...
- Hands-on experience with current open-source LLMs and ecosystem tools (e.g., model serving, fine-tuning, prompt engineering, embeddings).
- Experience developing generative AI products or platforms, including multimodal use cases (e.g., text, vision, audio, document understanding).
...
- Bachelors in Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or equivalent technologies/experience.
- Experience with:
...
- UI/UX development: JavaScript (Angular, React).
- Backend development: REST API, web apps, microservices.
- Experience supporting feature development and maintenance for an enterprise-scale application.
- Experience building multi-step agentic workflows and orchestrators using frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, PromptGraph, or custom in-house pipelines.

results.title: AI Optimization Engineer | Careerport
highlights:
production with measurable business impact across domains such as supply chain, logistics, production scheduling, vehicle routing, or related fields. · Proficiency with at least one major OR/optimization framework: Google OR-Tools, Gurobi, CPLEX, HiGHS, SCIP, or equivalent. · Strong programming skills in Python; C++ or Java a plus. · Hands-on experience with cloud platforms, particularly AWS, including deploying and scaling computational workloads. · Familiarity with Large Language Models (LLMs) and generative AI, and an awareness of how they can complement optimization workflows. · Exceptional communication skills able to translate complex algorithmic concepts into clear, business-relevant terms for non-technical stakeholders, and convey the value of your work in a way that resonates across the organization. · Ability to model ambiguous, real-world constraints rigorously and defend and advocate for design decisions at all levels of the organization. · Genuinely curious you ask why the problem exists, not just how to solve it, and you bring that curiosity into every stage of the work. · Strong product ownership mindset you take responsibility for outcomes, not just outputs, and care about whether your solution actually works for the people using it. · Outcomes-driven you measure success by the real-world impact your work delivers, not by the sophistication of the technology or elegance of the process behind it. The goal is results that matter to the business and the customer. Preferred: · Impactful experience in one or more of the following: transportation, logistics, supply chain, fleet management, manufacturing or mill production scheduling, or the agri-food industry. · Familiarity with geospatial data and road network routing APIs (e.g., Google Maps Platform, HERE, Mapbox). · Experience leading optimization work within an Agile, cross-functional product team. · Comfort integrating optimization outputs into enterprise software workflows and ERP data models.     EOE Statement: Datacor is an Equal Opportunity Employer and does not discriminate on the basis or race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other protected characteristic.  Use of AI During Interviews:  At Datacor, we value thoughtful problem-solving and authentic perspectives. To ensure a fair and consistent evaluation process, we ask that candidates do not use generative AI tools or outside assistance during live interviews unless explicitly stated otherwise. We're interested in hearing your experience, your approach, and how you think through challenges.

highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.
...

You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.

Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Experience with training models or utilizing foundation models and fine-tuning them to meet custom business requirements.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.

...
# Distinguished Data Scientist: Associate AI Experience
...
Distinguished individual contributor role leading next-generation agentic AI systems and autonomous agents at enterprise scale across Walmart's global operations, combining deep ML/AI expertise with cross-functional mentorship and high-impact productionized solutions.
...
We are seeking a Distinguished Data Scientist to provide technical leadership and long‑term vision for next‑generation AI systems and platforms. This senior individual contributor will drive breakthrough system design and advanced solution development that transforms Walmart at scale. The role combines deep technical expertise (ML, simulation, optimization, agentic AI) with cross‑functional influence, mentoring of senior talent, and delivery of high‑impact, productionized solutions. You will be a great fit if: - You architect end-to-end ML/AI systems — from feature engineering through production deployment and monitoring - You’ve built and shipped multiple autonomous AI agents (not just experimented with LLM APIs) - You’re Level 5+ on Steve Yegge’s Vibe Coding scale and can ship production systems through AI-assisted development - You combine deep statistical rigor with practical business impact
...
About the Team The Associate AI Experiences team applies advanced data science, machine learning, and agentic AI to solve high-impact business problems across Walmart globally. You’ll build production Agentic systems, deploy autonomous AI agents, and translate complex data into actionable insights that drive measurable business value at massive scale. Our team builds intelligent platforms, agents and ML-powered solutions that make associates’ jobs easier, faster, and more fulfilling across stores, fulfillment centers, distribution centers, and home office. We leverage the Element LLM Gateway to safely access state-of-the-art language models while keeping all data within Walmart’s network. Our work spans NLP, computer vision, time series forecasting, and multi-agent AI systems at enterprise scale.
...
- Build and deploy production ML systems end-to-end: data pipelines, feature stores, model training, serving layers, monitoring, and feedback loops at scale
...
- Provide technical visionand lead advanced development in agentic AI, reinforcement learning, and simulation.
...
- Architect and deploy large-scale AI systems and autonomous AI agents — conversational assistants, predictive agents with tool-calling, and multi-agent orchestration systems using LangChain, Pydantic AI, and RAG patterns
...
- Deploy NLP pipelines at enterprise scale — semantic similarity across millions of records using BERT/SBERT embeddings and vector search (FAISS)
...
- Deep expertise in ML algorithms (XGBoost, CatBoost, LightGBM, Random Forest, AutoML) and deep learning (PyTorch, transformer architectures).
...
- Production experience with NLP (BERT, SBERT, FAISS, RAG), computer vision (YOLO, CLIP), and time series forecasting (ARIMA, Prophet).
...
- Hands-on experience building and orchestrating multiple AI agents with LangChain, RAG, tool integration, and memory management.
...
- Multi-cloud ML platform proficiency — AWS SageMaker AND GCP (Vertex AI, BigQuery, BigQuery ML).
...
- Strong Python skills (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn) with containerization (Docker) and MLOps practices.
...
- Masters degree in Statistics, Economics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field AND 8+ years’ experience in data science or Machine Learning roles with demonstrated impact.
...
- PhD in AI, Machine Learning, Computer Science, Information Technology, Statistics, Applied Mathematics, Econometrics, or related field with relevant industry experience.
